ddls:
CREATE TABLE "apps" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each app */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the app */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the app belongs to */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the app */,
  "reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the app */,
  "installs" TEXT /* Number of installations of the app */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the app (e.g., free, paid) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the app */,
  "content_rating" TEXT /* Content rating of the app (e.g., Everyone, Teen) */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who created the app */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the app */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the app icon */,
  "screenshots" TEXT /* URLs of app screenshots (comma-separated) */,
  "min_installs" INTEGER /* Minimum number of installations */,
  "max_installs" INTEGER /* Maximum number of installations */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the app was last updated */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the app */,
  "in_app_purchases" INTEGER /* Indicates if the app has in-app purchases */,
  "ad_supported" INTEGER /* Indicates if the app is ad-supported */,
  "privacy_policy_url" TEXT /* URL to the app's privacy policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apps_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_genres" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "android_version" TEXT /* Android version required by the version */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the app version */,
  "what_is_new" TEXT /* Description of what's new in this version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "download_url" TEXT /* URL to download the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app the update belongs to */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version updated to */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the update */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog of the update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the update (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_updates_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_updates_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, data scientist, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the app */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the app was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the app */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the app */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
